questions.question: In Pinia Colada, what does the key option in useQuery serve?
options: It sets a unique store module name in Pinia
It identifies the cache entry and deduplicates requests across components
It is a security token for authenticated requests
It maps to a specific API endpoint path

questions.question: Which Pinia Colada hook is used to implement optimistic updates before the server responds?
What happens to a useQuery cache entry when queryCache.invalidateQueries is called on its key?
options: The cache entry is permanently deleted
The entry is marked as stale, triggering a refetch in components using that query
The query is paused and won't run until manually resumed
All components using that query are unmounted and remounted
